creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rakuco
Date: Tue May 14 19:31:05 2013
New Revision: 318192

Log:
  Update to 1.536.

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	imapsync
-PORTVERSION=	1.508
+PORTVERSION=	1.536
 CATEGORIES=	mail perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	https://fedorahosted.org/released/${PORTNAME}/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz

 Good at IMAP migration.
